motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def getKth(self, lo: int, hi: int, k: int) -> int:
    power_array = [pow(x, k, 2) for x in range(lo, hi+1)]
    return power_array[lo - power_array.index(min(power_array))]

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
